title: atriplex gmelinii subsp. dilatata
intro: Atriplex gmelinii subsp. dilatata, also known as the saltbush, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Atriplex gmelinii subsp. dilatata include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Atriplex gmelinii subsp. dilatata can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
